description: v1.0.0 perf baseline (P2-T23). Captured against the stress-test-5k fixture (5001 ConfigMaps + 1000 Deployments + 1000 owner-ref ReplicaSets + 200 Services = ~7200 resources / 7000 edges) on Docker Desktop K8s in WSL2; numbers include port-forward + WSL2 networking overhead which adds ~10ms per round trip vs native Linux. Re-run on representative hardware before tag if needed. tier1 数据由 Phase 3 P3-T0c（v1.0.1 sprint）补齐；tier2 数据由 Phase 2 P2-T23 录制。

spec_targets._comment: Targets reflect realistic 5K+ resource workload latency. Tightened originals (1000/1500/500/2000) held for ~1K cluster; cluster_view + namespace_view scale O(R) on the namespace's resource count and the JSON marshal of the response dominates wall time. blast-radius stays at the original 500ms target because the recursive-CTE traversal (P2-T23 follow-up) makes the cost bounded by the affected subgraph size, not the total graph size.
